name: @ai-native-methodology/plan-coverage-validator
description: v9.x MINOR 신설 (DEC-2026-05-25-axis-a-phase-4-1 정합 / Phase 4-1 Senior BLOCKER-2 흡수). chain harness 안 plan stage (chain 3) coverage validator. task-plan.json 산출물 검증 — TASK ↔ AC backward link + TASK ↔ TC forward link + NFR allocation (high+critical) hard gate + TASK granularity (1~3 AC 묶음) + dependency cycle (DAG) + risk severity. exit code contract (0=ok / 1=blocking findings / 2=usage-error). chain-coverage-validator 동형 paradigm.
